zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian Multon於1199年10月之前出生在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓時，她的父親Thomas de Multon II34歲，母親Sarah de Flete25歲。她於大約1210年與Sir Robert Le Vavasour在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1233年9月30日之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian Multon于1199年10月之前出生在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Multon II34岁，母亲Sarah de Flete25岁。她于大约1210年与Sir Robert Le Vavasour在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1233年9月30日之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Julian Multon was born before October 1199, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Thomas de Multon II, was 34 and her mother, Sarah de Flete, was 25. She married Sir Robert Le Vavasour about 1210, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 30 September 1233, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian Multon est née avant octobre 1199, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Multon II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Flete, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Le Vavasour environ 1210, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 30 septembre 1233, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julian Multon vor Oktober 1199 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Multon II 34 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Flete 25. Sie hat um 1210 in England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Le Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 30. September 1233 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Multon è nata il prima del ottobre 1199 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Multon II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Flete, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Le Vavasour circa 1210, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 30 settembre 1233, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian Multonが1199年10月以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Multon IIは34歳，母Sarah de Fleteは25歳であった。約1210年にイギリスイギリスでSir Robert Le Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1233年9月30日以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian Multon(이)가 1199년 10월 이전 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Multon II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Flete(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Robert Le Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 9월 30일 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

mn.before October 1199–after 30 September 1: 1199 оны Аравдугаар сараас өмнө–1233 оны Есдүгээр сарын 30–наас хойш

pt.before October 1199–after 30 September 1: antes outubro de 1199–após 30 de setembro de 1233
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Multon nasceu antes outubro de 1199, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Multon II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Flete, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Le Vavasour aproximadamente 1210, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 30 de setembro de 1233, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian Multon родилась перед октябрь 1199 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Multon II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Flete, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Le Vavasour около 1210 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 30 сентябрь 1233 г. в местности Англия.

Se casó con Sir Robert Le Vavasour aproximadamente 1210, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 30 de septiembre de 1233, en Inglaterra.
